text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
M-mountain climbing is so much fun! The weather
was really great too...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was worried my bad luck would make it rain...
but I'm glad that didn't happen!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you... for inviting me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The coffee we drank at the mountain's peak... was
strangely... delicious, despite being the instant
kind.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps, the primary factor was body dehydration
from sweating as we hiked, or the drop in
temperature upon reaching the peak.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Or it could be attributed to "spending quality
time with great friends."

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Friends... Um, could you two do me... a favor?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There's a fork in the path beyond this rope
bridge... I'll take the left... Will you take the
right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I'm s-so sorry! Did I do something wrong?
Or... I hope I didn't offend you!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No, that's not... what I meant.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I made eye contact with an
unsavory... "someone" on our way to the peak.
Ever since, they've been following us...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It might be dangerous... so you should take... a
different route home.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Are you using yourself as a d-decoy? Let me be
the decoy. I'm sure that bad thing found you
because of me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If I'm left alone, that "someone" will follow me
instead... Leave me behind and save yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Remain calm, Rice. Cafe, will you explain to us
the level of danger presented by this "someone"
we cannot perceive?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You find it... unbelievable?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Negative. Not all existence is within the visible
spectrum.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I only argue against the idea that it is necessary
for us to be divided.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Considering our leg strength, I believe the three
of us can outrun that "someone" together.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... We made it... back!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What a relief... It wasn't able to keep up... with us
at full speed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Confirming location—Tracen Academy gates. We
have arrived at our destination.
Status—uninjured. Mission phase "Return
Together" was successful.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Operation Friendly Outing is complete. I thank
you both for your assistance.
